rulings.Case Title: FB GLOBAL PROPERTIES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP VS. CHRIS DIEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Order For Sale Of A Dwelling And Issuance Of Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Real Property Should Not Be Made
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2024 line 1. PLAINTIFF FB GLOBAL PROPERTIES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP Application For Order For Sale Of A Dwelling And Issuance Of Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Real Property Should Not Be Made is DENIED without prejudice. No evidence provided that the judgment debtor "Chris Diez" and "Christopher Diez" identified on the Quitclaim Deed attached to Baum declaration are the same person. The Court also notes that Chris Diez was purportedly served on November 19, 2021 at "124 Lomita Avenue, San Francisco 94122" while Notice of this Application was mailed to a different address in South San Francisco "124 Lomitas Avenue South San Francisco, CA." =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LAURENCE F. NASEY VS. FELL HOLDINGS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of M. Ryan Pinkston
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2024 line 5. DEFENDANT FELL HOLDINGS LLC, STANYAN HOLDINGS LLC, MDF FACILITY LLC, 1215 FELL SF OWNER LLC, 624 STANYAN SF OWNER LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of M. Ryan Pinkston is GRANTED with leave to amend. In opposition Plaintiff suggests, pointing to vague and conclusory allegations in the operative complaint, that its claims depend on (1) parol evidence/unspecified representations made to induce Plaintiff to enter into the contract; (2) facts surrounding defendant's purported acts that prevented Plaintiff from performing; however no such facts are alleged in the complaint (3) interpretation of ambiguities in the contract; however no such ambiguities are identified in the complaint. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to make the allegations referenced in the opposition. Plaintiff may allege additional causes of action if new allegations support any new causes of action. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 345 CALIFORNIA L.P. VS. 28 SASF OWNER, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Seal Its Motion To Strike Or Stay Allegations Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2024 line 14. DEFENDANT 28 SASF OWNER, LLC Notice Of Motion To Seal Its Motion To Strike Or Stay Allegations Of Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The motion is GRANTED as to Declaration of Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, 2 and Exhibit A to the Declaration of Karen G. Johnson-McKewan. The motion is otherwise denied. Moving party failed to establish al elements required for sealing for any other part of the motion to strike. The Court notes that the information contained in the paragraphs of the motion to strike that moving party requests to seal is also contained in Plaintiff's complaint that is not subject to this motion to seal. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
